title: NoKanji Language Pack
description: This is a small Resource Pack that tries to translate every Text in Minecraft to one without Kanji. It also replaces the blocky Minecraft Font with a more readable one.
body:
# NoKanji Language Pack Don't know Kanji yet, but wanna Play Minecraft in Japanese?
Just remove them... :)
### This is a small Resource-Pack that adds a new Language to Minecraft, that is based on Japanese but without Kanji.
The translations are based on [pykakasi](https://pypi.org/project/pykakasi/). These are by no means perfect, but it was a quick way to realize this.

Note: Updates are not guaranteed. Bug fixes are implemented mostly based on personal need and/or seventy of a Problem.
